parsed.production_notes: The video relies on a single static AI-generated image with only the mouth and slight facial movements animated. The robotic body parts and background remain completely frozen, typical of basic AI lip-syncing.

characters.appearance: Female cyborg with a human face and metallic robotic arms and neck. Fair complexion, dark hair in a bun with white flowers.
characters.wardrobe: Beige saree with a red and gold border.

scenes.setting: Auditorium stage, dimly lit, dark color palette with beige and red accents.

panels.panel_visual_description: A female cyborg stands behind a dark grey podium. She has a human face with fair skin, dark hair in a bun with white flowers, and wears a beige saree with a red and gold border. Her arms and neck are made of metallic robotic parts. Behind her is a large screen showing a blurred, larger image of the same cyborg. The background is a dimly lit auditorium with an audience.

scenes.visual_description: A cyborg woman delivers a speech from a podium on a stage. A large screen behind her mirrors her image. Dynamic text captions appear over her as she speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: আমি তোমাকে challenge দিচ্ছি চোদ্দ দিন। [I challenge you for 14 days.]
Character A says: রোজ শুধু পনেরো মিনিট expert দের video দেখো। [Watch expert videos for just 15 minutes every day.]
Character A says: আমার সাথে practice করো। [Practice with me.]
Character A says: March শেষ হওয়ার আগে তুমি English বলতে শুরু করে দেবে। [Before March ends, you will start speaking English.]
Character A says: এক টাকার হিম্মত আছে? [Do you have the courage for one rupee?]
Character A says: দেখো English শেখা কঠিন না। [Look, learning English is not difficult.]
Character A says: কঠিন হলো শুরু করা। [The difficult part is starting.]
Character A says: তাই আজ থেকেই শুরু করো। [So start from today.]
Character A says: English শিখো app download করো। [Download the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: দুই সপ্তাহের challenge নাও। [Take the two-week challenge.]
Character A says: রোজ শুধু পনেরো মিনিট। [Just 15 minutes a day.]
Character A says: প্রথম সপ্তাহ expert দের video দেখো। [First week, watch expert videos.]
Character A says: Spoken English show আছে। [There is a Spoken English show.]
Character A says: সহজে বুঝিয়ে English বলতে শেখায়। [It teaches you to speak English by explaining it simply.]
Character A says: Basic থেকে start। [Start from the basics.]
Character A says: Hello, thank you, excuse me. [Hello, thank you, excuse me.]
Character A says: ছোট দুই পাঁচ মিনিটের video এত সহজ যে মনে হবে এটা আমিও পারি। [Short two to five-minute videos are so easy that you will feel, "I can do this too."]
Character A says: দ্বিতীয় সপ্তাহ আমার সাথে practice করো। [Second week, practice with me.]
Character A says: আমি তোমার AI coach চব্বিশ ঘণ্টা available। [I am your AI coach, available 24 hours.]
Character A says: সকাল পাঁচটা হোক রাত বারোটা হোক যখন ইচ্ছা তখন practice। [Whether it's 5 AM or 12 midnight, practice whenever you want.]
Character A says: Video তে যা শিখলে সেটা আমার সাথে বলে practice করো। [Whatever you learned in the video, practice by speaking it with me.]
Character A says: বারবার বলো। [Say it again and again.]
Character A says: ধীরে ধীরে সব ঠিক হয়ে যাবে। [Gradually everything will be fine.]
Character A says: আমি তোমাকে guide করব। [I will guide you.]
Character A says: সবচেয়ে বড় কথা কোন stranger এর সাথে কথা বলতে হবে না। [The biggest thing is you don't have to talk to any stranger.]
Character A says: কারো সামনে লজ্জা পাওয়ার দরকার নেই। [No need to feel shy in front of anyone.]
Character A says: শুধু তুমি আর আমি private, safe, তোমার নিজের speed এ। [Just you and me, private, safe, at your own speed.]
Character A says: চোদ্দ দিনে কি হবে? [What will happen in 14 days?]
Character A says: Perfect English হবে না এটা আমি বলব না। [I won't say it will be perfect English.]
Character A says: কিন্তু তুমি বলতে পারবে না থামিয়ে, না ভয় পেয়ে, না লজ্জা পেয়ে। [But you will be able to speak without stopping, without fear, without feeling shy.]
Character A says: আর এটাই enough শুরু করার জন্য। [And this is enough to start.]
Character A says: Expert রা শেখাবে, তুমি practice করবে। [Experts will teach, you will practice.]
Character A says: এক টাকার trial। [One rupee trial.]
Character A says: কোন বাহানা না। [No excuses.]
Character A says: শুধু practice। [Just practice.]
Character A says: English শিখো app download করো। [Download the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: আজ থেকেই এখনই install button এ click করো। [Click the install button right now from today.]
Character A says: English শিখো app download করো। [Download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
AI FOR A BETTER TOMORROW
INNOVATE. EMPOWER. ELEVATE.
FUTURE UNLEASHED 2025
(Dynamic Bengali subtitles matching the audio)

scenes.setting: Digital graphic background, purple color palette.

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically against a dark purple background. The phone screen shows a glowing, stylized graphic of a streetlamp and sparkling light effects. Below the graphic is a white rectangular button.

scenes.visual_description: A digital end card shows a smartphone mockup with the app logo and an install button. A long disclaimer text appears at the very end.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: এখনই দেরি না করে install now এ click করো। [Don't delay, click on install now right away.]
Character A says: আর English শিখো app download করে নাও। [And download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
English Seekho
Install Now
English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
